race.comment: The well-related COOL DRINKS (6) (half to 2xG1 winner Shout The Bar) returned in good order with a solid Sunny Coast win before hitting the frame at Ipswich last time out. Winning rider Rodd sticks in the saddle and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Should prove very hard to hold out. THE BIG BLUE (2) also hails from a handy family (half to 2xG3 winner and G1 placed Annavisto) and will be rock-hard fit for this. Include from the favourable draw. CANSORT (3) placed over this track and trip last time out and must be respected out of the Waller yard. Top-three aspirations. CAST PARTY (1) gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim and may earn some minor money. TESSTIFY TRIO (5) next best in a race with only a handful of chances.
